nodes.itemHTML: • [RustScan][https://github.com/rustscan/rustscanstars4k] - Extremely fast port scanner built with Rust, designed to scan all ports in a couple of seconds and utilizes nmap to perform port enumeration in a fraction of the time.
• Cipheystars6.8k - Automated decryption tool using artificial intelligence & natural language processing.
• Digital-Currencystars39 - Create your own Self-Hosted Digital Currency. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
• openscapstars767 - The oscap program is a command line tool that allows users to load, scan, validate, edit, and export SCAP documents.

• Reactive Resume - A one-of-a-kind resume builder that keeps your privacy in mind. Completely secure, customizable, portable, open-source and free forever. (Demo, Source Codestars2.7k) MIT Docker/Nodejs
• 🍓 App templatestars307 - An empty CakePHP project for use with composer.
• compiler-explorer - Run GNAT FSF compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly.

• “So the trick is basically to put them (your direct reports) in charge, not you. You have the supporting role, they can request things from you. But the goal needs to be very clear.” (source) - A recipe on how to work with your direct reports, from a section of 7 habits of highly effective people.
• lakeFSstars1.1k lakeFS is an open source platform that delivers resilience and manageability to object-storage based data lakes.
• Blogifierstars838 - ASP.NET Core Blogging application with Blazor Admin Dashboard. Demo.
• BlazorMobilestars405 - Create full C# driven hybrid-apps for iOS, Android, UWP & Desktop with Blazor.
• BlazorWebViewstars111 - A BlazorWebView "Control" that is easily embedded in (Native) UI frameworks.
• BlazorGrpcstars48 - Sample project that demonstrates how you can use the power of Blazor, ASP.NET Core, and gRPC to create a web application which can communicate with a backend that uses gRPC.
• Blazor + Sitecorestars43 - Example of dynamic pages and routes with SiteCore and Helix.
• Try F# on WebAssemblystars29 - The F# compiler running in WebAssembly with Bolero.
• BlazorPointstars30 - Sample App to help you get started with hosting Blazor on SharePoint Pages, completely Client Side.
• Blazor + Umbraco Heartcore - Example of using Umbraco Heartcore with Blazor.

• BlazorGrpcWebCodeFirststars26 - Sample project that demonstrates how you can use gRPC-Web with Blazor WebAssembly hosted on ASP.NET Core. Publish and consume your services without having to create .proto files - with the code-first approach.
• Logging.Samplesstars11 - Samples for .NET Core and ASP.NET Core logging using various logger frameworks.

• Scalable sentiment analysis - A sample ables to make sentiment analysis prediction/detection of what the user is writing in a very UI interactive app (Blazor based) in the client side and running an ML.NET model (Sentiment analysis based on binary-classification) in the server side.

• optimizer.mlstars37 - A "server-less" general purpose optimization suite for algorithm parameters. Also provides offline optimization of Quantconnect Leanstars4.9k trading algorithms. Demo (https://optimizer.ml).
• Baseball Machine Learning Workbenchstars26 - A web application that showcases performing what-if analysis using in-memory Machine Learning models. Live demo.
• PropertyPricesstars3 - A blazor front-end site that provides analysis and ensemble learning predictions (through SharpLearning) of property prices in the UK. Demo (https://propertyprices.org.uk).
• BlazorML5stars32 - ML5 Machine Learning for Blazor with JSInterop mechanism.
• Minimal ToDo by David Fowler - Minimal ToDo backend API implementation by David Fowler from Microsoft.
• Bolero.TodoMVCstars36 - A TodoMVC clone using Bolero.
• Flight Finder - Flight Finder.
• Oqtane Frameworkstars871 - Modular Application Framework for Blazor.

• CarCheckerstars615 - This is a sample application for Blazor by Steve Sanderson which was presented at Build 2020. You can view the on-demand walk-through for this on Channel 9: Modern Web UI with Blazor WebAssembly. This is a great sample which has a lot of Blazor + ASP.NET integrations such as: client-side debugging with Visual Studio, authentication / authorization, input validation, data integration/sync, Blazor components, code sharing, JavaScript interop, localization / internationalization, Progressive Web App (PWA) and more.
• BlazorFileReaderstars293 - Read-only File streams in Blazor. Demo.
• BlazorChatSamplestars151 - Blazor chat demo using SignalR JS client with interop.
• Blazor contactsstars109 - A project template for OData API, IdentityServer4 auth, and server-side Blazor.
• Moneystars118 - A money manager implemented using CQRS+ES. Demo.

• NethereumBlazorstars67 - Ethereum blockchain explorer and simple wallet.
• Runnystars53 - Prototype of running roslyn in the browser via Blazor. Demo.
• BlazorDynamicListstars40 - Dynamic component binding for a generic list. Demo.
• BlazorServerTreestars34 - A simple Server-Side Blazor sample app to deal with hierarchical data.
• WebSocketPagestars25 - Web Socket in Blazor. demo.
• BlazorPagesstars32 - A sample client-side Blazor app showcasing automatic deployment to GitHub Pages via Azure Pipelines.
• C# Miniferstars4 A client-side Blazor application demonstrating live minification of C# code using the C# Minifierstars22 library. Demo.

• Planning Pokerstars29 – An app to play Planning Poker for distributed teams. The app is implemented using Blazor and shows how to switch between client-side and server-side mode with a configuration change. Demo.
• Gjallarhornstars4 - Compare packages on different NuGet-sources. Demonstrating Client-Side Blazor MVVM-style.
• C# Regex Tester onlinestars3 - Online tool for verify .Net regex syntax. (Demo).
• C# Regex Online toolstars1 - Online tool for verify .Net regex syntax, see splits list, table etc. (Demo).
• Blazor.Consolestars30 - A simple component to mock CLI for ASP.NET Core 3.0 Blazor applications to execute some custom commands for an application.
• Cognitive Studiostars13 - PWA enabled app used to showcase what Cognitive Services can do, built-in client-side Blazor. Demo.
• Blazor Wake-on-LANstars15 - Wake-on-LAN app for local networks. Blazor Server + EF Core + DI + CI.
• BlazorOCRstars24 - A Blazor WebAssembly application for reading receipts.
• Dcidrstars13 - Blazor WebAssembly decision-making app with PWA (offline), localstorage, and Excel export. Demo.
• BlazorParallaxstars5 - Simple Parallax Page sample with Blazor Server.
• GTAVehiclesstars11 - Sample app to manage GTA vehicles. Demo.
• BlazingWafflesstars2 - A Blazor app that wraps Waffle Generatorstars52. The generator outputs readable gibberish that can be used in place of Lorum Ipsum. Demo.
• Poker Odds Pro Calculatorstars6 - Responsive poker odds calculator using blazor WebAssembly and pure C#. Demo.
• Cærostrisstars34 - A Blazor Spotify client.
• Blazor Chatstars7 - A sample project that demonstrates using a Singleton class to communicate to all subscribers. Site is also live at https://blazorchat.com.
• Nethereum Playgroundstars10 - Compile and run Nethereum snippets on the browser. You can run it here: http://playground.nethereum.com/.
• BlazorAnimatestars4 - A simple example of animating text along a path using Blazor Canvas Extensions. Demo.
• Realtime chat app with WebAssemblystars5 - Real-time chat application with SignalR, .NET and Blazor/WebAssembly.
• BlazorContribstars2 - Experiment of a Blazor renderer for Markdig, a Markdown component.
• BlazeReportstars4 - A minimal example of a Blazor App with NUnit, Selenium, SpecFlow and ExtentReports.
• BlazorConduitstars25 - The RealWorld example app written using Blazor. Demo.
• Create a 2D game with Blazor - July 2020 - Part 1: Intro. Part 2: Canvas initialization. Part 3: Sprite rendering. Part 4: Moving a sprite. Source codestars42 .
• Build Tic Tac Toe game with Blazor WebAssembly - July 2020 - Build Tic Tac Toe game with Blazor WebAssembly. Source codestars4 . Demo.

• Custom Authentication in Blazor WebAssembly – Detailed Tutorial - June 12, 2020 - In this next part of the Blazor Blog Series, Let’s learn about implementing Custom Authentication in Blazor WebAssembly Project (Blazor.Learner). We will cover some core concepts that can get you familiar with how authentication works in Blazor Applications. Source codestars30 .

• Blazor CRUD with Entity Framework Core – Detailed Tutorial - June 4, 2020 - Building a CRUD Application is like the Hello World for Intermediate Developers. It helps you understand the most common operations of any particular stack. In this tutorial, let’s build a Client-side Blazor CRUD Application that uses Entity Framework Core as it’s Data Access Layer. Source code .

• Creating Outlook Calendar Client from scratch - May, 2020 - In this course you'll see how to develop a calendar application from scratch (design, structing and logic) then make it integrated with Microsoft Outlook so our events on the calendar being synced with Outlook. Source codestars33 .
• BlazorWebFormsComponentsstars279 - A collection of Blazor components that emulate the web forms components of the same name.
• BlazorCssstars11 - CSS Helper for BlazorStyled which provides auto complete CSS styles.
• BlazorCssGridstars6 - Css Helper for defining Grid SPA layouts in BlazorStyled.
• Blazor PDFstars43 - Generate de PDF document with iTextSharp from a Blazor Server App.
• Blazor-Color-Pickerstars20 - Opens a palette with the Material colors for Blazor application.
• Blazor_EmojiFilePickerstars0 - Bootstrap Text-Input with Smiley- and File-Support for Blazor.

• Blazor Library Asset Helperstars1 - A VISX extension that can list all JS and CSS assets from Nuget package razor libraries you are using in your Blazor app. It will generate all the <script> and <link> tags for your HTML page for you to copy/paste. Available on the Visual Studio Marketplace.

• SpotifyServicestars7 - A high-level Spotify API library for Blazor WebAssembly projects that enables Spotify playback in the browser, manages OAuth 2.0 authorization, provides easy access to the Spotify Web API and uses IndexedDB caching.
• Blazor Twitch Bot Examples for GitHub - June 9, 2020 - Blazor Twitch Bot Examples for GitHub. Source codestars14 .
• Blazor Dev Server with CSS Live Reloaderstars14 - Alternative Blazor Dev Server to be available CSS live reloading.
• LiveSharpstars92 - Update .razor files and see the updates instantly without reloading the page. Your application state is preserved because there is no need to reload anything. livesharp.net.
• Blazor Minimum Project Templatesstars20 - A project templates package of Blazor apps without JavaScript and CSS libraries.
• Blazor REPLstars214 - Write, compile, execute and share Blazor components entirely in the browser - https://blazorrepl.com.

• BlazorSourceManglerstars1 - A console app to mangle Blazor DLLs. Check this YouTube video for more details. You can also check this Blazor TODO app to see result of this app (downloaded blazortodos.dll is mangled and decompilation shows uglyfied code).
• WebCompilerstars50 - A dotnet global tool for compilation, minification, and compression of scss, css and js.
• Tracetoolstars21 - Tracetool viewer, client Api for Dotnet, Java, Javasvript, C++ , Python, Delphi.
• nanstars36 - Zero allocation Nullable structures in one library with handy conversion functions, marshallers and unmarshallers.
• ttlcachestars227 - In-memory string-interface{} cache with various time-based expiration options and callbacks.
• Blazor Train: Modal Dialogs with Chris Sainty - August 7, 2020 - Carl welcomes Chris Sainty back to BlazorTrain to show Blazored.Modal, his OSS Modal Dialog component.
• Blazor WebAssembly : Open-source Project - EP10 - July 29, 2020 - Let's make the BlazingChat app Open-Source and walk through rest of MVVM code for Contacts and Settings page, by Curious Drive.
• Live game development - August 4, 2020 - Lets focus on the Blazor Game Client, migrating of Module Implementations and Client Asset Builders.
• Live game development - August 1, 2020 - Migrating old TypeScript Client to a Blazor Client. Now with more BabylonJS Interop API.
• Live game development - July 31, 2020 - Live game development.
• Blazor: Zero To Hero Real Time Implementation Part III - July 20, 2020 - This is part three of the “Blazor: Zero to Hero” article series. This article has a detailed look at the Project Structure.
• Conway's Game of Life (With Emojis!) in C# and Blazor WebAssembly - July 6, 2020 - Conway's Game of Life (With Emojis!) in C# and Blazor WebAssembly. Code sourcestars88 .
• Ericsson Research - Connect ROS2 applications to 5G networks for M2M communication.
• Make a responsive Navbar with Blazor and Tailwind? - August 4, 2020 - Make a responsive Navbar with Blazor and Tailwind?

• Xamarin Blazor Mobile Button Event Handlers - August 3, 2020 - Using the Blazor programming model to handle button events, like OnClick, makes writing Xamarin mobile applications with form inputs a breeze.

• Introducing Plugin Framework 1.0.0 – Plugins for .NET apps including Blazor and ASP.NET Core with built-in support for Nuget - August 3, 2020 - Plugin Framework is a new MIT-licensed plugin platform for .NET Core applications. It is light-weight and easy way to add a plugin-support into your application. It supports all the major types of .NET Core applications, including ASP.NET Core, Blazor, Console Apps and WPF & WinForms.

• Implement the "download file" feature on a Blazor WebAssembly app - August 2, 2020 - If we want to implement the "download file" feature (please imagine a picture that was posted on Facebook can be downloadable) on your Blazor WebAssembly app project, how can we implement that feature? Source codestars5 .
• Securing Blazor WebAssembly Apps - July 21, 2020 - Learn how to secure Blazor WebAssembly applications with Auth0. Source codestars11 .
